meta.decision_summary: [phase:verification] No safe in-scope actions selected. Possible reasons: budget exhausted, all actions already executed, or scope constraints.

highlights: Captured 4 parameter name(s) for follow-up input audits.

findings.name: Passive Subdomain Enumeration Results
reproduction_steps: Query crt.sh for %.lynolz.com and review returned SAN/CN values.
findings.recommendation: Review evidence, confirm impact, and apply least-privilege plus secure configuration controls.

findings.name: No Obvious CORS Misconfiguration
findings.evidence: [{"origin": "https://evil.example.com", "status_code": 405, "probe_method": "OPTIONS", "allow_origin": null, "allow_credentials": null}, {"origin": "null", "status_code": 405, "probe_method": "OPTIONS", "allow_origin": null, "allow_credentials": null}, {"origin": "https://dogs.lynolz.com.evil.invalid", "status_code": 405, "probe_method": "OPTIONS", "allow_origin": null, "allow_credentials": null}]
reproduction_steps: Probe https://dogs.lynolz.com:443 with untrusted Origin headers and inspect response.
findings.recommendation: Remove public exposure, rotate leaked secrets, and enforce deny-by-default on sensitive files.

findings.name: Potential XSS Reflection / Encoding Weakness
reproduction_steps: Request endpoint with canary input: https://dogs.lynolz.com:443/100
Observe raw reflection at position 5262 in javascript context.
Verify output encoding for this context.
findings.recommendation: Apply context-aware output encoding and CSP; avoid unsafe DOM sinks.
